markdown:
#  Edit a Commitment's Schedule of Values (iOS) 
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions:**
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Commitments tool.
  * **Additional Information:**
    * This action can be performed in offline mode if the asset/item was previously viewed and cached on your mobile device. Tasks performed in offline mode will sync with Procore once a network connection is reestablished.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create a Purchase Order](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/create-a-purchase-order) or Create a Subcontract
  * Set the accounting method on the contract. See [Edit the Advanced Settings Tab on a Commitment](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-project/tutorials/edit-the-advanced-settings-on-a-commitment).


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Commitments** tool using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
  2. Tap the commitment you want to edit the schedule of values for.
  3. Tap **Schedule of Values**.
  4. Tap the item you want to edit.
  5. Tap **Edit**.
  6. Tap into a field to modify the appropriate information.
  7. Tap **Save**.


## See Also
  * [Which Procore tools support Work Breakdown Structure?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-which-procore-tools-support-work-breakdown-structure)
  * [Commitments (iOS) - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/permissions)
  * [View Purchase Orders and Subcontracts (iOS)](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/commitments-ios/tutorials/view-purchase-orders-and-subcontracts-ios)
title: Edit a Commitment's Schedule of Values (iOS)
description: How to edit the schedule of values of a commitment using the Procore app on an iOS mobile device.
